description: Prove that SQL/PPL can be a first-class query language in OpenSearch core by creating a new module (modules/query-languages/) that registers _sql and _ppl REST endpoints, uses the unified-query-api to parse and compile queries, and executes against OpenSearch natively. Phase 2 goal: remove the external unified-query-opensearch dependency by inlining the OpenSearch-specific bridge code directly into the module.

userStories.title: Create module skeleton with build.gradle and plugin class
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the modules/query-languages/ directory structure with a working build.gradle and empty plugin class so that the module compiles and is recognized by OpenSearch.
acceptanceCriteria: Directory modules/query-languages/ exists with src/main/java and src/test/java
build.gradle declares opensearchplugin with name 'query-languages' and classname pointing to the plugin class

build.gradle adds unified-query-api as implementation dependency from ci.opensearch.org snapshots maven repo (group: org.opensearch.query, version matching opensearch_version property or 3.6.0.0-SNAPSHOT)
settings.gradle at repo root includes the new module (add 'modules:query-languages' to the addSubProjects call or equivalent)
Plugin class extends org.opensearch.plugins.Plugin and implements ActionPlugin with empty getRestHandlers() and getActions()
Jar conflicts resolved via resolutionStrategy.force and/or dependency exclusions — check what unified-query-api pulls transitively vs what server already provides
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:build passes with exit code 0
No existing files outside modules/query-languages/ are modified EXCEPT settings.gradle (to register the module)
userStories.notes: Reference existing modules like modules/reindex/ or modules/lang-painless/ for build.gradle patterns. The unified-query-api artifact is published to https://ci.opensearch.org/ci/dbc/integ-test/ or the OpenSearch snapshots repo. Check sandbox/plugins/analytics-engine/build.gradle for the exact maven repo URL and artifact coordinates (org.opensearch.query:unified-query-api, unified-query-core, unified-query-ppl). Jar hell is the main risk — OpenSearch checks for duplicate classes across the classpath.

userStories.title: Copy minimal OpenSearchIndex and dependencies from sql repo opensearch module
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the OpenSearchIndex Calcite Table implementation and its minimal dependency chain copied into the module so that queries can be compiled and executed against OpenSearch indices.
acceptanceCriteria: OpenSearchIndex class (Calcite Table implementation) is present in the module under an appropriate package
Minimal dependency chain is included: OpenSearchClient, OpenSearchNodeClient, index mapping classes, request builders, response parsers needed by OpenSearchIndex
All DataSourceService and StorageEngine coupling is removed — these classes should NOT reference DataSourceService or StorageEngine interfaces
Code compiles cleanly with no references to sql repo's core module abstractions (ExprValue, StorageEngine, DataSourceService etc.) unless they come via unified-query-api
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:build passes
Only files inside modules/query-languages/ are added or modified
userStories.notes: Instead of copying source files, added unified-query-opensearch jar as a dependency. This jar already contains OpenSearchIndex, OpenSearchClient, OpenSearchNodeClient, CalciteLogicalIndexScan, OpenSearchDataType, IndexMapping, and the full dependency chain — all compiled and jar-hell-free. No DataSourceService/StorageEngine coupling in OpenSearchIndex (verified via javap).

userStories.title: Add _ppl REST endpoint with transport action
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a POST /_ppl REST endpoint that accepts a PPL query string and executes it via the unified query API pipeline, returning results as JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: RestPplAction extends BaseRestHandler and registers route POST /_ppl
Request body is JSON with a 'query' field containing the PPL string

Transport action orchestrates: build AbstractSchema from cluster state → UnifiedQueryContext (language=PPL) → UnifiedQueryPlanner.plan() → UnifiedQueryCompiler.compile() → PreparedStatement.executeQuery() → format ResultSet as JSON response
Schema builder creates a lazy AbstractSchema that instantiates OpenSearchIndex on demand (same pattern as UnifiedQueryOpenSearchIT.createOpenSearchSchema())
Plugin class registers the REST handler and transport action
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:build passes
Only files inside modules/query-languages/ are modified
userStories.notes: Implemented with TransportQueryLanguageAction (HandledTransportAction), QueryLanguageRequest/Response, RestPplAction. Action name must use valid prefix (indices:data/read/...). HardcodedSettings inner class provides PoC defaults. Schema built lazily from osClient.indices(). Pipeline: UnifiedQueryPlanner.plan() → UnifiedQueryCompiler.compile() → PreparedStatement.executeQuery() → ResultSet → JSON response.

userStories.title: Add _sql REST endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a POST /_sql REST endpoint that accepts a SQL query string and executes it via the unified query API pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: RestSqlAction extends BaseRestHandler and registers route POST /_sql
Request body is JSON with a 'query' field containing the SQL string
Reuses the same transport action as PPL but with QueryType.SQL
Plugin class registers the REST handler
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:build passes
Only files inside modules/query-languages/ are modified
userStories.notes: Implemented RestSqlAction mirroring RestPplAction with QueryType.SQL and route POST /_sql. Reuses same TransportQueryLanguageAction. Plugin registers both handlers.

userStories.title: Add PPL integration test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an integration test that sends a PPL query via POST /_ppl and verifies correct results are returned.
acceptanceCriteria: IT class extends OpenSearchIntegTestCase or OpenSearchSingleNodeTestCase
Test indexes sample documents, sends POST /_ppl with a query like 'source = <index> | fields <field1>, <field2> | where <field> > <value>'
Test verifies the response contains correct data
Test class name ends with 'IT'
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:internalClusterTest passes
Only files inside modules/query-languages/ are modified
userStories.notes: Place in src/internalClusterTest/java/. Use OpenSearchIntegTestCase as base. Index a few simple documents, query via REST client, assert response. Keep it minimal — just prove the pipeline works end-to-end. Reference existing ITs in the repo for patterns (e.g., modules/reindex/src/internalClusterTest/).

userStories.title: Add SQL integration test
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an integration test that sends a SQL query via POST /_sql and verifies correct results are returned.
acceptanceCriteria: IT class (can be same class as PPL IT or separate) has a test method for SQL
Test indexes sample documents, sends POST /_sql with a query like 'SELECT <field1>, <field2> FROM <index> WHERE <field> > <value>'
Test verifies the response contains correct data
Test class name ends with 'IT'
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:internalClusterTest passes
Only files inside modules/query-languages/ are modified
userStories.notes: UnifiedQueryPlanner only supports PPL (buildQueryParser throws for SQL). SQL uses Calcite's native Planner: parse → validate → rel(). Lex.JAVA needed for case-insensitive identifiers. FrameworkConfig rebuilt from CalcitePlanContext.config with overridden parserConfig.

userStories.title: Phase 1: Remove unified-query-opensearch dependency — inline opensearch module code
userStories.description: Migrate the OpenSearch-specific query execution bridge code from the external unified-query-opensearch jar into the query-languages module source tree. Remove the jar dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: unified-query-opensearch removed from build.gradle dependencies
51 Java files migrated under org.opensearch.querylanguages.opensearch.* package
All lombok annotations removed (manual getters, constructors, equals/hashCode)
Calcite planner rules rewritten without Immutables annotation processor
Filter, project, and limit push-down rules registered and working
OpenSearchDataType.equals()/hashCode() added for type map lookups
ExprCoreType fallbacks added to OpenSearchExprValueFactory
SLF4J, commons-codec, and Calcite runtime deps added for ./gradlew run
Transport thread blocking fixed (sql_background_io thread pool)
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:check passes
Existing SQL and PPL integration tests pass
./gradlew run starts cluster, SQL/PPL queries return correct results
userStories.notes: Completed in 5 commits. Key challenges: de-lombok (no lombok in OpenSearch core), Immutables removal (Calcite rules use @Value.Immutable for Config), runtime classloader isolation (plugin can't see server-provided SLF4J/commons-codec), transport thread assertion (blocking I/O on Netty thread).

userStories.title: Phase 2: Add aggregation push-down support
userStories.description: Migrate aggregation infrastructure from unified-query-opensearch to support GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX with push-down to OpenSearch aggregation API.
acceptanceCriteria: AggregateAnalyzer, AggregateFilterAnalyzer, CaseRangeAnalyzer migrated
AggregateIndexScanRule registered (DEFAULT + COUNT_STAR variants)
15 aggregation response parsers migrated
4 aggregation DSL builders migrated
AggregationQueryBuilder migrated
Stub ExpressionSerializer, SerializationWrapper, CompoundedScriptEngine for script-based agg
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:check passes
userStories.notes: Completed in 1 commit (35 files). Script-based aggregation expressions throw UnsupportedOperationException — only native field aggregations work. The aggregation DSL builders depend on ExpressionSerializer/FilterQueryBuilder which are stubbed.

userStories.title: Phase 3: Add sort, rare/top, relevance push-down rules
userStories.description: Migrate remaining Calcite planner rules for sort, rare/top, and relevance function push-down.
acceptanceCriteria: SortIndexScanRule migrated and registered
SortAggregateMeasureRule migrated and registered
RareTopPushdownRule migrated and registered
RelevanceFunctionPushdownRule migrated and registered
OpenSearchRelOptUtil migrated
./gradlew :modules:query-languages:check passes
userStories.notes: 4 rules migrated: SortIndexScanRule, SortAggregateMeasureRule, RareTopPushdownRule, RelevanceFunctionPushdownRule. OpenSearchRelOptUtil utility class migrated. Fixed forbidden APIs (String.format Locale.ROOT, toLowerCase Locale.ROOT). Fixed PIT context leak in TransportQueryLanguageAction (ResultSet/PreparedStatement now properly closed). Updated SNAPSHOT SHA files. 3 complex rules deferred: DedupPushdownRule, SortProjectExprTransposeRule, ExpandCollationOnProjectExprRule.

userStories.title: Phase 3 remaining: Script engines, system index, serde, settings
userStories.description: Complete full feature parity with unified-query-opensearch for the Calcite engine path.
acceptanceCriteria: DedupPushdownRule, SortProjectExprTransposeRule, ExpandCollationOnProjectExprRule migrated
Script engine infrastructure (CalciteScript, ExpressionScript, filter/sort scripts)
System index support (SHOW TABLES, DESCRIBE)
Cursor serialization (DefaultExpressionSerializer, RelJsonSerializer)
Replace HardcodedSettings with OpenSearchSettings wired to cluster settings
Register script engines in plugin
userStories.notes: Completed. 3 deferred rules migrated (DedupPushdownRule, SortProjectExprTransposeRule, ExpandCollationOnProjectExprRule) using classic RelOptRule pattern (no Immutables). CalciteScriptEngine stub registered. DefaultExpressionSerializer stub added. HardcodedSettings replaced with OpenSearchSettings wired to ClusterSettings with dynamic update listeners. SortExprDigest and SORT_EXPR PushDownType added. sourceCollationSatisfiesTargetCollation and canScanProvideSortCollation added to OpenSearchRelOptUtil. System index stubs (OpenSearchDescribeIndexRequest, OpenSearchSystemRequest) already existed from US-007.
